semantic.role: Orchestration service for persisting and querying LLM configuration settings across global and project scopes, consumed by CLI commands.
responsibilities: Resolve the appropriate config/secrets store and label for LLM configuration targeting either global or project scope.
Persist a single LLM setting (provider, model, base URL, or API key) into the target configuration or secrets store.
Clear a persisted LLM API key from the target secrets store.
Save a complete LLM setup (provider, model, and API key) in one operation to the target stores.
Build a status view model that aggregates LLM settings from both global and project scopes for user-facing display.
outOfScope: File system traversal beyond the scope-detection logic.
invariants: Assumes Config and Secrets interfaces expose setLLMProvider, setLLMModel, setLLMBaseURL, setLLMApiKey, clearLLMApiKey methods.
Assumes getGlobalArchSpineDir returns the global ArchSpine directory.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a stable, maintainable layer for CLI commands to interact with LLM configuration persistence without exposing infra details directly.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Minor fixes and synchronization of accumulated source changes from release gate.

publicSurface.description: Determines the correct config store, secrets store, and label for the given LLM scope (global or project), returning an LLMCommandTarget.
Writes a single LLM configuration value (provider, model, base-url, or api-key) into the target's config or secrets store.
Removes the LLM API key from the target's secrets store and returns a confirmation message.
Persists provider, model, and API key to the target stores in one call for a complete LLM setup.
Constructs a view model of current LLM configuration by merging project and global settings, including resolved provider, model, base URL, and API key presence.
Interface defining the contract for config store, secrets store, and label required to persist LLM settings.
Interface representing a complete LLM setup with provider, optional model, and optional API key.
Interface representing the structured output of buildLLMStatusViewModel for display.
Type alias restricting LLM configuration scope to either 'global' or 'project'.

English.role: Orchestration service for persisting and querying LLM configuration settings across global and project scopes, consumed by CLI commands.
responsibilities: Resolve the appropriate config/secrets store and label for LLM configuration targeting either global or project scope.
Persist a single LLM setting (provider, model, base URL, or API key) into the target configuration or secrets store.
Clear a persisted LLM API key from the target secrets store.
Save a complete LLM setup (provider, model, and API key) in one operation to the target stores.
Build a status view model that aggregates LLM settings from both global and project scopes for user-facing display.
outOfScope: File system traversal beyond the scope-detection logic.

exports.name: resolveLLMTarget
setPersistedLLMValue
exports.signature:
setPersistedLLMValue(
  target: LLMCommandTarget,
  key: 'provider' | 'model' | 'base-url' | 'api-key',
  value: string,
)

exports.name: buildLLMStatusViewModel
